steps.title: Identify the key evidence about how oil shocks have changed
steps.content: The decisive clue is in the second sentence: the effect of recent oil shocks on India's GDP was “only slightly greater than zero.” This means oil shocks have become much weaker in their economic impact.

steps.title: Match the change to the correct word
steps.content: Abated means “diminished” or “became less intense”—exactly what the passage shows: oil shocks' effect on the economy has shrunk to nearly nothing as non-oil energy use has grown. The other three describe either a return to a previous state, reluctant acceptance, or fluctuation—none fit this sustained weakening. That matches choice D — D is correct.
